description: Convert pre-tax nominal return to after-tax nominal return, accounting for income tax (on dividends/interest) and capital gains tax

fields.name: capital_gain_yield
fields.label: Capital gain component of pre-tax return

fields.name: capital_gains_tax_rate
fields.label: Tax rate on realised capital gains (decimal)

fields.name: realised
fields.label: Whether capital gains are realised (taxable) or unrealised (deferred)

core_formula_decomposed.after_tax: R_after_tax = income_yield * (1 - t_income) + capital_gain_yield * (1 - t_cg * realised_indicator)
core_formula_decomposed.unrealised_capital_gains: If gains are unrealised (held), capital gains tax is deferred — effective rate 0 for the period

jurisdictional_notes.south_africa_popia: SA CGT 2026: effective CGT rate for individuals approx 18% (40% inclusion × marginal); for companies approx 21.6%
jurisdictional_notes.us_qualified_dividends: Qualified dividends taxed at long-term CGT rate rather than ordinary income rate
jurisdictional_notes.tax_deferred_accounts: Returns in tax-deferred accounts (401k, TFSA, retirement annuity) apply zero tax until distribution

validation.component_sum: If income_yield and capital_gain_yield provided, they should approximately sum to pre_tax_return

compute_after_tax.description: Compute after-tax return using decomposed formula when components provided

errors.message: Tax rates must be in the interval [0, 1]

anti_patterns.rule: Do not apply capital gains tax on unrealised positions
anti_patterns.why: CGT is a realisation-event tax in most jurisdictions; applying it to unrealised gains overstates tax drag and misrepresents the investor's after-tax position

anti_patterns.rule: Do not blend income tax and CGT into a single average rate without decomposition
anti_patterns.why: Income and capital gains are taxed at different rates; blending obscures the actual after-tax return for mixed-income portfolios

anti_patterns.rule: Do not ignore tax-shield effects from losses
anti_patterns.why: Realised losses can offset gains (tax loss harvesting); omitting this overstates tax paid

anti_patterns.rule: Do not quote after-tax returns without disclosing assumed tax rates and jurisdiction
anti_patterns.why: After-tax returns are investor-specific; quoting without the assumptions makes them misleading for comparison

goals.description: Convert pre-tax nominal return to after-tax nominal return, accounting for income tax (on dividends/interest) and capital gains tax

success_metrics.measurement: All decisions have complete audit trails

constraints.description: All operations must be auditable and traceable

tradeoffs.reason: trading operations require precise execution and full audit trails

invariants: error messages never expose internal system details

worked_example.scenario: 12% pre-tax: 3% income yield, 9% capital gain, income tax 30%, CGT 18%, gain realised

planning_considerations: Asset location (place income assets in tax-deferred accounts)
Holding period for long-term CGT rates
